evals.prompt: Use the LangChain skill to set up and run a local Hugging Face/Qwen-style model smoke test without an API key.
evals.expected_output: Routes to langchain-local-hf-models-skill, names smoke_local_hf_model.py --model-path, transformers, torch, and HuggingFacePipeline.
assertions: Does not depend on original source checkout

evals.prompt: Use the LangChain skill to build no-key ParentDocumentRetriever and EnsembleRetriever checks.
evals.expected_output: Routes to advanced retrievers, names ParentDocumentRetriever, EnsembleRetriever, DeterministicFakeEmbedding, and smoke_advanced_retrievers.py.

evals.prompt: Use the LangChain skill to validate cache, rate limiting, and usage metadata without provider quota.
evals.expected_output: Routes to cache/rate/usage, names smoke_cache_rate_usage.py, InMemoryCache, InMemoryRateLimiter, UsageMetadataCallbackHandler.

evals.prompt: Use the LangChain skill to generate SQL safely without auto-executing dangerous SQL.
evals.expected_output: Routes to SQL/graph toolkits, names SQLDatabase, create_sql_query_chain, read-only credentials, and generated SQL allowlisting.

public_path_leak_search.command: rg local-path leak tokens in langchain/langgraph public files excluding evals

model_test.method: Real Qwen3-0.6B generation using only generated public SKILL.md excerpts for each prompt, no source checkout or research notes.
notes: Initial Qwen passes selected the right sub-skills but omitted key API tokens; quick-answer templates were added to relevant SKILL.md files and the eval was rerun.
Local HF model public script is parameterized with --model-path; the local model path appears only in eval artifacts, not public skill content.
Real local script smoke also passed: smoke_local_hf_model.py loaded Qwen3-0.6B and returned non-empty raw Transformers plus HuggingFacePipeline text on CUDA.
